rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the out-of-scope Layer-5/6 placeholders (`IsUnipotent`, `ReductiveGroup`, `SemisimpleGroup`) from the diff, but Review 2 gives the better scope outcome by splitting off the premature material while preserving plausible Layer-0 foundations. Review 1’s extra demand to remove/split `AffineAlgGroup` depends on roadmap text not shown in the diff and could push unnecessary churn.
